name: Pumpkin-Apricot Creme Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Spray a 15x10x1-inch jelly roll pan with Baker's Joy.
3. Sift together the first five ingredients; set aside.
4. In a large mixer bowl, beat eggs at high speed for 5 minutes until thick. Reduce to medium speed and add sugar, pumpkin, and lemon juice. Mix for 2 minutes.
5. Carefully fold the sifted dry ingredients into the pumpkin mixture using a spatula. Spread batter evenly into the prepared pan.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Immediately turn out onto a towel dusted with sifted confectioners sugar and roll up tightly.
7. Cool completely on a wire rack.
APRICOT-CREME FILLING AND TOPPING
1. In a small mixer bowl, cream together softened cream cheese and margarine or butter until fluffy. Reduce speed to low.
2. Gradually add confectioners sugar one cup at a time, mixing well after each addition. Increase to medium-high speed and mix for 2 minutes until fluffy.
3. Unroll the cake and spread evenly with 1-1/2 cups of cream cheese mixture. Spread top with 1 cup of apricot pastry filling.
4. Using an end of the towel, re-roll the cake evenly and tightly. Carefully place seam-side down on an oval or rectangular platter.
5. Decorate the top as desired with remaining cream cheese mixture. Sprinkle with chopped pecans.
